mapper.select: SELECT * FROM exercise WHERE id = #{id} AND is_deleted = 0
SELECT * FROM exercise WHERE category = #{category} AND is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_weight DESC, id ASC

SELECT * FROM exercise WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND category = #{category} AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR key_points LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY sort_weight DESC, id ASC

SELECT * FROM exercise WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR description LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR key_points LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY sort_weight DESC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM exercise WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY sort_weight DESC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exercise (name, category, description, key_points, precautions, video_path, upload_user_id, audit_status, sort_weight, view_count) VALUES (#{name}, #{category}, #{description}, #{keyPoints}, #{precautions}, #{videoPath}, #{uploadUserId}, #{auditStatus}, #{sortWeight}, #{viewCount})
mapper.update: UPDATE exercise SET is_deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE exercise SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
